candidates.label: smart-prompt-truncation-on-retry
candidates.targeted_failure_mode: Multi-attempt tasks waste token budget by re-sending full contents of unchanged files on each retry attempt

candidates.label: handle-crlf-line-endings
candidates.targeted_failure_mode: Model output with Windows line endings (\r\n) fails regex parsing

candidates.targeted_failure_mode: agent wastes token budget by re-reading unchanged files across retry attempts instead of using a reusable change-tracking tool

candidates.label: localize-failure-functions
candidates.targeted_failure_mode: agent does not localize which function is wrong before editing

candidates.label: include-test-source-in-prompt

candidates.label: enable-context-gathering-with-import-sea
